task_summary: Pack a single wrapped product into a mailer box and close the box.

evidence.note: small kraft mailer box, open at the start, closed by the end
flat item wrapped in white paper; 'paper-wrapped product' is a sufficient role selector for this task

initial_state.description: The mailer box is open and empty.

evidence.note: box open and empty at the start

initial_state.description: The wrapped product is on the table beside the box.

steps.description: Place the wrapped product into the mailer box.

evidence.note: product inside the box and being pressed down by ~5.0s

steps.description: Fold the flaps closed over the product.

final_goals.description: The wrapped product is inside the carton.

evidence.quote: Pack the product into the carton and close it.

ordering.rationale: The product must be inside before the box is closed - a physical constraint, and it is demonstrated in this order.

evidence.note: product placed, then flaps closed over it
